name_cn:
Jackie Shoulder Bag
▫️Model 820415
▫️Dimensions 27.5*19*4
Gucci's new Jackie 1961 series tells a brand story across eras with its iconic push-lock and classic silhouette. This handbag is crafted from exquisite leather, interpreting timeless elegance with a modern style.
